rationale: The two papers share core outcome constructs (category incidence, brand choice, and purchase quantity), so the cited 2002 study could plausibly be part of the conceptual background for the citing 2007 framework. However, their designs differ substantially (multicategory household-level structural utility model vs. store-level VAR promotion dynamics), and the provided match evidence is only a DOI reference with no in-text citation context. Given this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop, but importance is not clearly established.
